testCases: TC1: Basic, no AI, small numbers → total = $50.50
TC2: Pro, no AI → total = $80.25
TC3: Enterprise, no AI → total = $210.05
TC4: Basic, AI on ($20 addon) → total = $70.50
TC5: Pro, AI on ($20 addon) → total = $100.25
TC6: Enterprise, AI on (dedicated specialist $100) → total = $310.05
TC7: Large numbers, basic, no AI → total = $5100.00
TC8: Zero campaigns → error "Number of campaigns must be greater than 0"
TC9: Negative contacts → error "Number of contacts must be greater than 0"
TC10: NaN param1 → error "Primary input must be a valid number"
TC11: Invalid plan tier → error "Invalid plan tier. Allowed: basic, pro, enterprise"
TC12: param4 not boolean → error "AI optimization must be a boolean"
TC13: param1 non‑numeric string → error "Primary input must be a valid number"
TC14: param2 empty string → error "Secondary input must be a valid number"
TC15: Pro, large numbers, no AI → total = $5050.50
TC16: Float campaigns, Pro, AI on → total = $86.50
TC17: param1 undefined → error "Primary input is required"
TC18: param3 missing → error "Plan tier is required"
TC19: param4 null → error "AI optimization must be a boolean"
TC20: Zero contacts → error "Number of contacts must be greater than 0"
TC21: Negative campaigns → error "Number of campaigns must be greater than 0"
TC22: Enterprise, huge contacts, AI off → total = $20200.10
TC23: Basic, AI on, float contacts → total = $70.50 (contacts=500.5 => cost 0.5005)
